turns.raw_response:
```repl
# Extract the relevant part of the context

# Use llm_query to find the meeting schedule

# Check if the meeting schedule was found
if "not found" not in meeting_schedule.lower():

else:
    FINAL("not found")
```

relevant_part = context[0:1000]  # Assuming the meeting schedule is in the first 1000 characters

# Use llm_query to find the meeting schedule
meeting_schedule = llm_query(f"Find the scheduled date of the meeting. Quote the relevant sentence. If not found say 'not found'.\n\n{relevant_part}")
